headline: Is Arista Networks (ANET) Still Attractive After Its Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Arista Networks' share price still makes sense for new money going in, it helps to step back and look at what the current market price is actually implying about the business. The stock closed at US$133.50 recently, with returns of 4.8% over the last 7 days, a 5.8% decline over 30 days, roughly flat year to date at 0.1%, a 55.2% gain over 1 year, and a very large 3 year return that is close to 3x, alongside a very large 5 year return figure. Recent coverage has...

headline: Nvidia to invest $4 billion in two photonics companies
summary: Coherent and Lumentum will both receive $2 billion each from the chip giant as part of the strategic investment.
